reviews.review_description:
This game can hold 12 players in a hilarious turn based combat game. You play as a hamster moving around an open world using a drag-to-aim mechanic to fire a variety of weapons. Last player standing wins. 

I love how relaxed the game play is while also being engaging, hilarious, and thrilling. You will be able to have a conversation with your friends while also executing your strategy to make it to the end. 

This is an excellent party game that your friends and family will LOVE. 

Great work, developers!

It is great that somebody decided to work on the "Worms" concept for VR. It is fun, you can play with AI etc, so worth trying. There are some rough edges but it is in development and they are not critical.
Great Game. It's fun with friends for sure . Can recommend to try it 👍

If you’ve ever wanted Worms-style chaos in VR, but with fearless, battle-hardened hamsters, this is the game for you! Combat Hamsters  delivers hilarious yet strategic mayhem, with physics-based multiplayer, fully destructible terrain, and an arsenal of wild weapons to unleash on your enemies.

The skill-based combat keeps every match engaging, whether you’re battling AI or up to five other players in intense free-for-all or team-based fights. The procedurally generated levels ensure no two games feel the same, and every explosion, mine dodge, and perfectly timed shot adds to the fun.

With its charming yet chaotic gameplay, this is an easy recommendation for fans of strategy-based VR combat. Whether solo or multiplayer, it’s an absolute blast! 🐹💥🔥

A great twist on a classic format, VR suits this style of game way better than I expected, elevating it to new levels of fun within 3d. The locomotion system is also really inventive and results in no nausea compared to standard locomotion in other games!

It's so nice to see games like this being developed. Takes me back to the days of when Worms first released, however a lot more fun to mobilise your Hamster troops and wage war on the other teams. Still in early access but I expect this game to really grow. It has won my heart, looking forward to jumping in again.

It's a fascinating game !
But i couldn't play with other people. I know there is a multiplayer mode ,but the way of Hosting a match is not very helpful. It shouldn't let me play unless there is an opponent at least. I guess a lobby will be very helpful

This game is sick too play with friend and it's
 well developed. Just try the game and you will see
This game excelent!!! Add more maps and add please Hungarian subtitles!
